_metadata.description: GPU parallelism defaults for drug-DCF optimization on this workstation.

tuning_notes.derivation: VRAM/job ~1202 MiB at parallel=20 (24GB used). 80% of 49140 MiB => ~33 jobs. parallel=36 hit 99% SM / 42GB VRAM and 36x OOM (-9); use 33.
tuning_notes.oom_fallback: If pretrain OOM, set PRETRAIN_PARALLEL=28-30 via env. If GPU util <60%, try 34.
